hero.title: Your Trusted Partner in Cleaning & Maintenance Services
hero.subtitle: We provide professional and comprehensive solutions for homes and commercial facilities across Saudi Arabia

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We offer a comprehensive range of cleaning and maintenance services with the highest quality standards

ac-cleaning.title: AC Cleaning
ac-cleaning.description: Professional cleaning and maintenance for all types of air conditioners to ensure optimal performance and clean air

sofa-cleaning.title: Sofa & Upholstery Cleaning
sofa-cleaning.description: Deep cleaning for sofas and upholstery using the latest technologies to restore their appearance

carpet-cleaning.title: Carpet & Rug Cleaning
carpet-cleaning.description: Professional washing of carpets and rugs with complete stain and odor removal

pest-control.title: Pest Control
pest-control.description: Comprehensive pest control services for all types of insects and rodents using safe materials

water-tank.title: Water Tank Cleaning
water-tank.description: Cleaning and sterilization of water tanks to ensure clean and healthy water

disinfection.title: Disinfection Services
disinfection.description: Comprehensive disinfection for homes and facilities using the latest sanitization technologies

trust.title: Why Choose Us?
trust.subtitle: We are committed to delivering the highest levels of quality and professionalism

points.2: Using the latest equipment and technologies

clients.title: Our Valued Clients
clients.subtitle: We are proud of the trust of our clients from major companies and institutions

certificates.title: Certificates & Accreditations
certificates.subtitle: Certified with the most important international quality and safety standards

iso9001.title: ISO 9001:2015
iso9001.description: ARS-registered quality management system covering blasting, protective coatings, marine and onshore maintenance, and a broad contracting scope.

iso14001.title: ISO 14001:2015
iso14001.description: Certified environmental management system aligned with international requirements for responsible operations.

iso45001.title: ISO 45001:2018
iso45001.description: Occupational health and safety management to reduce risk and protect teams across active work sites.

saso.title: SASO
saso.description: Conformity and quality marking for products and services in line with SASO requirements in Saudi Arabia.

certificates.gallerySectionSubtitle: Client letters, accomplishment certificates, and approvals from paint brands, energy, and port operators — tap any card to view the document clearly.

gallery.title: Works accomplishment — Gulf Stevedoring
gallery.description: Confirmation of painting and surface treatment works for yard cranes at Jeddah Islamic Port.

gallery.title: Experience letter — Red Sea Gateway Terminal
gallery.description: Statement on maintenance and repair services for terminal equipment and yard cranes over years of professional cooperation.

gallery.title: Letter of appreciation — Petromin
gallery.description: Recognition of execution quality for blasting and protective coating renewal on storage tanks at Petromin Jeddah.

gallery.title: Statement of achievement — Zamil Offshore
gallery.description: Confirmation of offshore works at Jeddah shipyard: blasting, painting, washing, and hull treatment to safety and quality standards.

gallery.title: Certificate of appreciation — Teras Offshore
gallery.description: Recognition for helideck maintenance (blasting and painting) on the Teras Fortress project.

gallery.title: Qualified contractor — Hempel Marine
gallery.description: Approval as a supply & apply contractor for Hempel marine coatings under approved procedures.

gallery.title: Qualified applicator — Interchar (fire protection)
gallery.description: Recognition of MT SERVICES as a qualified applicator for Interchar intumescent and protective coating systems.

gallery.title: Applicator approval — Jotun
gallery.description: Approval as a competent applicator for Jotun protective and intumescent coatings per manufacturer instructions.

gallery.title: Applicator attendance record — Jotun
gallery.description: Attendance documentation for technical staff in Jotun protective coatings application programmes.

gallery.title: Works accomplishment — Gulf Stevedoring (Jubail)
gallery.description: Completion of painting works for quay cranes at Jubail Commercial Port within the project period.

gallery.title: Reference letter — Red Sea Gateway Terminal
gallery.description: Reference on remedial painting for STS cranes in service and workmanship under port conditions.

gallery.title: Works accomplishment — Liebherr quay crane
gallery.description: Confirmation of washing, rust removal, priming, and topcoat application for a yard crane at Jeddah port.

gallery.title: Supporting document — ports & contracting
gallery.description: Official certificate or letter complementing our track record in painting, maintenance, and heavy equipment.
